case_title: BENNY AGUILAR ET AL VS. ADINA NIEMEROW

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-12-2014 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCECS, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL.
